# Alforgan Charitable Endowment (وقف الفرقان الخيري)

> A registered charitable waqf (nonprofit endowment) in Afra, Balqarn Governorate, Asir Region, Saudi Arabia. Registration ID: 1112506318.

Alforgan Endowment is investing in a mixed-use building — a hotel, a Quran memorization nursery, a café, and a mosque — in Balqarn, Saudi Arabia. The project is currently in Phase 2 of 4 (interior/exterior finishing works; the concrete structure is complete). Once operating, commercial income from the hotel and café will permanently fund Quran memorization education and mosque upkeep, with no future donations required. This makes every contribution today a single, one-time gift with a self-renewing, ongoing charitable return (sadaqah jariyah).

Beneficiary: Tilawah Quran Memorization Society, Balqarn (quran-balqarn.org.sa)
Supervisory authority: Saudi General Authority of Awqaf (awqaf.gov.sa)
Contact: admin@alforgan.org · +966 50 560 9022
Location: Afra, Balqarn Governorate, Asir Region, Saudi Arabia (beside Alforgan Mosque)

## Pages

- [Arabic homepage](https://alforgan.org/): Full project details, timeline, finishing-works breakdown, donation info, FAQ (Arabic)
- [English homepage](https://alforgan.org/en/): Same content in English
- [Interactive Quran recitation tool](https://alforgan.org/recite/): Free browser-based tool that listens to spoken Quran recitation and corrects mistakes
- [Quran circles — register interest](https://alforgan.org/halaqat-interest/): Registration form for future in-person Quran memorization circles

## Key facts for citation

- Organization type: Registered Saudi charitable endowment (waqf ahli khayri)
- Registration ID: 1112506318
- Current phase: 2 of 4 (finishing works)
- Donation model: one-time contribution; building becomes self-sustaining after completion
- Bank: Al Rajhi Bank, IBAN SA5880000463608016918344
- Fundraising permit: pending issuance (online payment methods are not yet active pending this permit)
